testcases.input: root = [3,0,0] Output: 2 Explanation: From the root of the tree, we move one coin to its left child, and one coin to its right child.

testcases.input: root = [0,3,0] Output: 3 Explanation: From the left child of the root, we move two coins to the root [taking two moves]. Then, we move one coin from the root of the tree to the right child.
testcases.expectedOutput: 3 Explanation: From the left child of the root, we move two coins to the root [taking two moves]. Then, we move one coin from the root of the tree to the right child.
